/* Willverse Wiki site styles (pushed as MediaWiki:Common.css by setup_wiki_pages.py).
   Infobox card — navy + gold, matching the site logo. Templates emit class-based markup
   (see mediawiki/gen_infobox_templates.py); all visual decisions live here. */

table.infobox {
    float: right;
    clear: right;
    width: 22em;
    margin: 0 0 1em 1.5em;
    background: #fbfbf9;
    border: 1px solid #b6bcc8;
    border-spacing: 0;
    font-size: 88%;
    line-height: 1.45;
}
table.infobox .infobox-title {
    background: #22304f;
    color: #f0c96a;
    font-size: 118%;
    font-weight: bold;
    padding: 7px 10px;
    text-align: center;
    letter-spacing: 0.02em;
}
table.infobox .infobox-label {
    background: #eef0f4;
    color: #2c3345;
    font-weight: bold;
    text-align: left;
    vertical-align: top;
    padding: 5px 9px;
    width: 32%;
    white-space: nowrap;
    border-top: 1px solid #e3e6ec;
}
table.infobox .infobox-data {
    padding: 5px 9px;
    vertical-align: top;
    border-top: 1px solid #e3e6ec;
}
table.infobox .infobox-image {
    text-align: center;
    padding: 8px;
    background: #ffffff;
    border-top: 1px solid #e3e6ec;
}
table.infobox .infobox-caption {
    font-size: 92%;
    color: #5a6172;
    padding-top: 3px;
}
table.infobox .infobox-section {
    background: #d9dfeb;
    color: #22304f;
    font-weight: bold;
    text-align: center;
    padding: 4px 9px;
    border-top: 1px solid #b6bcc8;
}

/* Per-series footer navbox — same family as the infobox */
table.navbox {
    width: 100%;
    margin-top: 1.5em;
    background: #fbfbf9;
    border: 1px solid #b6bcc8;
    border-spacing: 0;
    font-size: 88%;
    line-height: 1.5;
}
table.navbox .navbox-title {
    background: #22304f;
    color: #f0c96a;
    font-size: 108%;
    padding: 5px 10px;
    text-align: center;
}
table.navbox .navbox-title a { color: #f0c96a; }
table.navbox .navbox-label {
    background: #eef0f4;
    color: #2c3345;
    text-align: left;
    vertical-align: top;
    padding: 4px 10px;
    width: 6em;
    white-space: nowrap;
    border-top: 1px solid #e3e6ec;
}
table.navbox .navbox-data {
    padding: 4px 10px;
    vertical-align: top;
    border-top: 1px solid #e3e6ec;
}

/* Notice banners ({{Expand}} etc.) — Coppermind-style warm rounded strip */
.willverse-banner {
    background: #fdf6e3;
    border: 1px solid #c9b458;
    border-radius: 4px;
    padding: 6px 12px;
    margin: 0 0 1em;
    font-size: 92%;
}

/* Heading rules pick up the brand navy */
.mw-parser-output h2 {
    border-bottom: 1px solid #c8cfdd;
}

/* Slim spoiler strip (baseline styles are inline in the gadget; keep in sync) */
.willverse-spoiler-controls select { font-size: 95%; }
